metadata.score_convention: SIGNED (-1.0 to +1.0). Negative = -1.0 to < -0.20; Neutral = -0.20 to +0.20 (marginal/mixed band); Positive = > +0.20 to +1.0. rev1-9 used unsigned magnitude; rev10+ converted; cross-revision comparisons require sign-aware reading.

pir_06.verdict: [CRITICAL CARRIED + DEEPENED — Hamzah rebuke adds 5th converging trigger; BN-PN joint manifesto formalizes cooperation]. The Director-approved 1435 build (205 entities, finalized 22:41 MYT — 26 min after rev12) adds TWO significant PIR-06 escalations: (1) Hamzah's PUBLIC rebuke of Muhyiddin 'don't call PAS toxic, remember who helped you become PM' (FMT 19:46 EN + BM 19:54, 4-outlet) — the FIRST leader-to-leader intra-opposition warfare signal between the sacked-Bersatu-deputy (now Wawasan president) and the Bersatu president. This is the 5th converging [CRITICAL] trigger for Muhyiddin (-0.88 -> -0.90) and 6th for Bersatu (-0.84 -> -0.86). (2) BN-PN JOINT MANIFESTO confirmed by Annuar (NST 20:31 + BH 19:58 'manifesto bersepadu') — the formalization of gabung-jentera trajectory into a shared policy platform. This DEEPENS BN-PN cooperation while Bersatu simultaneously declares lebih-hebat exit + sasar-bentuk-kerajaan solo 24-seat bid. The central tension persists: PN concedes MB to BN AND merges machinery AND prepares joint manifesto, WHILE Bersatu declares exit and sasar solo-governing — running in parallel on the same ballot. Formal PN-MT expulsion notice / Bersatu candidate withdrawal STILL NOT DETECTED (10th consecutive pass).
pir_06.numeric_shift_check: rev12 -> rev13 deltas: Muhyiddin -0.88 -> -0.90 (+2.3%), Bersatu -0.84 -> -0.86 (+2.4%), Bersatu-PN fracture -0.86 -> -0.88 (+2.3%), PN-removal thread -0.87 -> -0.89 (+2.3%), toxic PN -0.72 -> -0.78 (+8.3%), kuorum -0.60 -> -0.65 (+8.3%), RoS -0.60 -> -0.62 (+3.3%), PAS -0.30 -> -0.25 (16.7% improving), Hadi -0.30 -> -0.25 (16.7% improving), Hamzah -0.15 -> -0.20 (33.3% — crosses >30% threshold but on the negative-deepening side for Hamzah personally; the Hamzah rebuke is the substantive signal, not the numeric shift per se), Kiandee -0.25 stable, PN +0.30 stable, BN +0.30 -> +0.35 (16.7% improving, joint manifesto), Wawasan -0.15 stable, Ridzuan +0.05 stable. CRITICAL continues to fire via the QUALITATIVE 'Bersatu internal-fracture signal sharp-negative' rule (now multi-publisher hard-news confirmed across lebih-hebat + sasar-kerajaan + PN-toksik + kuorum + HAMZAH REBUKE), NOT the numeric rule.
